observation.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && sed -i \
  -e 's/Ast2Asgs::operator()(ast::DirectDeclaratorContext\* ctx, TypeExpr sub)/Ast2Asg::operator()(ast::DirectDeclaratorContext* ctx, TypeExpr* sub)/' \
  -e 's/auto list = ctx->mul()/auto list = ctx->multiplicativeExpression()/' \
  -e 's/return self(ctx->eq())/return self(ctx->equalityExpression())/' \
  -e 's/if (auto ret = make<UnaryExpr>();/auto ret = make<UnaryExpr>();/' \
  -e 's/else if (text.size() == else if (text[1] ==/else if (text.size() == 1)\n      ret->val = 0;\n    else if (text[1] ==/' \
  task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp
